mapper.select: WITH target_instance AS (SELECT id FROM instance WHERE id = #{instanceId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), latest_snapshot AS (SELECT s.id FROM snapshot s JOIN target_instance ti ON ti.id = s.instance_id ORDER BY s.snapshot_time DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 1), mark_ranked AS (SELECT target_id, favorite, note, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY target_id ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC ) AS rn FROM block_snap_system.sys_user_mark WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = 2), latest_mark AS (SELECT target_id, favorite, note FROM mark_ranked WHERE rn = 1) SELECT ms.id AS id, mi.name AS name, ms.version AS version, CASE WHEN mi.version IS NOT NULL AND ms.version IS NOT NULL AND mi.version <> ms.version THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS is_new_version, ms.is_deleted AS is_deleted, ms.load_time AS load_time, IFNULL(lm.favorite, 0) AS favorite, lm.note AS note, ms.added_time AS added_time, ms.update_time AS update_time FROM mod_snapshot ms JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON ls.id = ms.snapshot_id JOIN mod_info mi ON mi.id = ms.mod_info_id LEFT JOIN latest_mark lm ON lm.target_id = ms.id ORDER BY ms.update_time DESC, ms.id DESC
